  "decision": "fail",

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Soft foot condition remains uncorrected on the machinery feet",
    "Dial indicator readings exceed the maximum allowable soft foot tolerance"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Loosen hold-down bolts and measure individual foot deflection using dial indicators or laser alignment system",
    "Clean, shim, or step-shim the affected feet to eliminate soft foot to within 0.002 inches (0.05 mm) tolerance",
    "Re-torque all bolts to specification and re-verify shaft alignment"
  ],
  "rationale": "An uncorrected soft foot introduces frame distortion, high vibration, and shaft misalignment when hold-down bolts are torqued. According to API 686, soft foot must be corrected to less than 0.002 inches (0.05 mm) before final shaft alignment can proceed.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 686 Chapter 7",
    "Laser Alignment System Manuals"
  ]
}
